beats.text: UNITED WON'T DO A NEW RASHFORD LOAN
A £40M RELEASE CLAUSE IS IN HIS UNITED CONTRACT
BUT LIVERPOOL AND MAN CITY ARE BOTH EXCLUDED
ANY OTHER CLUB CAN SIGN HIM FOR £40M

caption: United hold a transfer wildcard this summer 🔴 Barcelona's purchase option on Rashford expired on June 15 — and ESPN now confirms United have NO plans to offer a new loan. A permanent sale is the only option on the table. But here's the twist: David Ornstein reveals Rashford's United contract contains a £40m release clause... available to virtually every club in world football EXCEPT Liverpool and Man City, who are specifically barred from triggering it. Arsenal, Chelsea, Bayern Munich, Juventus — any of them can take him at £40m. Liverpool? Blocked. What should United do with Rashford this summer? 👇 REPORTED — per David Ornstein (The Athletic) / ESPN. #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #transfernews #transferwindow #rashford
